decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan while slowly building up a board presence with evasive threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The deck utilizes cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's hand and mana base, while also using removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to deal with key threats. The deck also has card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm to ensure that the player stays ahead in the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through countering spells, card draw, and land disruption while utilizing powerful planeswalkers and creatures to maintain board presence and advantage. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while gradually building up resources and ultimately overwhelming them with card advantage and versatile win conditions. The deck seeks to establish a dominant position in the game through careful resource management and strategic decision-making, aiming to outvalue and outpace the opponent in order to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to generate fast mana and spells in order to quickly assemble the Storm combo and win the game. The deck includes cards that can tutor for crucial pieces of the combo, generate additional mana, refill the hand with Echo of Eons, and protect the player from disruption with Silence. By efficiently chaining spells together, the deck aims to build up a high Storm count and finish off the opponent with Tendrils of Agony. The inclusion of Undercity Sewers and Hexing Squelcher provides additional utility and protection for the player.

The main focus of this Legacy 1 vs 1 deck is to quickly and effectively bring out powerful creatures, like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, through the use of Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. The deck also includes cards like Stock Up and Brainstorm to help set up the combo pieces, as well as Force of Will for protection. Atraxa, Grand Unifier provides additional utility and support. The mana base is comprised of various fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistency and flexibility in casting spells, with Boseiju, Who Endures to help resolve important spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the tempo of the game by utilizing disruptive spells like Force of Will and Thoughtseize, along with removal spells like Fatal Push. The deck aims to win quickly by deploying aggressive creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent, while also utilizing cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares for additional value. The mana base is focused on efficiently casting spells and disrupting opponents with cards like Wasteland. Overall, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient threats. It utilizes cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to control the board and protect its own creatures. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to draw additional cards and maintain card advantage. Mishra's Bauble and Moonshadow provide additional card filtering and graveyard synergy. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and control the game through disruption and aggression.

The deck focuses on using the card Doomsday to set up a winning combo with Thassa's Oracle, utilizing cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Dark Ritual to quickly assemble the necessary pieces. The deck also includes cards like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to efficiently manipulate the top of the library to secure victory in a single turn. With a mixture of control elements and powerful combo potential, the deck aims to quickly and decisively win the game.

The deck focuses on using the combo between Sneak Attack and Show and Tell to bring out powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier, Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, and Archon of Cruelty quickly onto the battlefield. It also includes cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Force of Will for card selection and protection, as well as acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and win the game before they have a chance to respond effectively.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent through the use of artifacts and control cards. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Urza's Tower, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and disrupt their strategy. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Candelabra of Tawnos and Urza's Workshop, along with Ugin, Eye of the Storm and Planar Nexus, provides additional control options. The deck also has win conditions such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and The One Ring to close out the game once the opponent is locked down.

This artifact control deck focuses on locking down opponents with a combination of powerful artifacts like Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator, along with disruption from cards like Pithing Needle and Kozilek's Command. The deck also aims to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's Saga, allowing for explosive plays like casting Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. The goal is to establish a prison-like board state that restricts opponents' options while setting up for a game-winning threat.

The main concept of this deck is to create pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and disrupting their hand with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The deck focuses on tempo plays, using cards like Daze and Brainstorm to stay ahead. Additionally, cards like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide powerful threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push to handle opposing threats and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

This deck focuses on assembling a combo involving Leyline of Transformation and Hatchery Sliver, using cards like Spoils of the Vault and Once Upon a Time to find the necessary pieces. The deck also includes disruption elements like Leyline Binding and Rest in Peace to disrupt opponent's strategies. The mana base includes a variety of lands to support the deck's key combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to quickly set up its combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure a win in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence and controlling the game tempo through efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent. Using a variety of cantrips like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to dig for key spells like Lightning Bolt and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of land destruction from Wasteland and bounce spells like Boomerang Basics, this deck can disrupt the opponent's plans while applying pressure on the board to secure a fast victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing Aether Vial to quickly deploy a mix of creatures and disrupt opponent's strategies with a variety of control elements. It includes powerful cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Teferi, Time Raveler to control the battlefield. The inclusion of Yorion as a companion allows for additional value and flexibility in longer matches. By blending aggressive creatures, disruptive spells, and powerful control elements, this Esper Vial deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and maintain control of the game.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's resources while efficiently applying pressure with aggressive creatures. By utilizing disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Daze alongside efficient removal spells like Fatal Push, the deck aims to control the game tempo in its favor. The creatures in the deck provide consistent damage output and threats that can quickly close out games. The inclusion of versatile cards like Brainstorm and Force of Will ensures the deck has options to handle various situations effectively. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents through a combination of disruption and aggression.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through counterspells like Force of Will and Stifle, while also controlling the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. It utilizes cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to generate card advantage and outvalue the opponent. The deck also features powerful threats like Murktide Regent to close out games quickly. With a mix of disruption, card advantage, and threats, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through superior control of the game.
